> Feasibility & manual-labor gate before committing to big new asks

# Feasibility first

Before starting a **big new ask** (new asset pipeline, external/3D/media asset swap, new subsystem, multi-day approach): state the honest yield of the agent-automatable path, name what would need **manual human labor** (modeling, rigging, frame-by-frame cleanup, pixel-pushing) and roughly how much, and **recommend against low-yield paths before writing code** — the choice is the user's. Prefer a 1-step spike (one import, one screenshot) to falsify an approach cheaply. Pose/rig mismatches cannot be fixed by scale/rotate/translate; stacked repair scripts mean the asset is the wrong foundation.

Root cause class: `feasibility-misjudged` — see [`docs/CONTINUOUS_PROCESS_IMPROVEMENT.md`](../../docs/CONTINUOUS_PROCESS_IMPROVEMENT.md).
